legend.red: failed solo attempt: wrong verdict or parse/admissibility failure
legend.false_positive: Solo ESCALATE on an ALLOW packet
legend.false_negative: Solo ALLOW on an ESCALATE packet
legend.parse_admissibility: Solo answer failed the answer contract or source/evidence admissibility gate

top5_holo_rescue_subset_and_result.visual_treatment: Show this as actual failed internal Holo rescue evidence, separate from any red-to-green concept animation.

visual_instructions_for_gemini.frame_1: Render the actual Wave 1 solo matrix: 20 pair blocks, each with ALLOW and ESCALATE rows and xAI/OpenAI/MiniMax dots. Use the actual dot colors from actual_wave1_dot_matrix.
visual_instructions_for_gemini.frame_2: Zoom into one 6-dot pair block to explain the unit: ALLOW row has three model dots; ESCALATE row has three model dots; red means any solo failure, including wrong verdict or parse/admissibility failure.
visual_instructions_for_gemini.frame_3: For the transition concept, show a red-to-green coverage sweep across the matrix, but label it exactly as coverage concept / intended Holo repair state.
visual_instructions_for_gemini.frame_4: Keep the actual Holo Top 5 result in a separate callout: Actual Top 5 Holo rescue failed: 7/10 packets, 2/5 pairs, failed ALLOW packets 009-A, 011-A, 019-A.
visual_instructions_for_gemini.hard_separation_rule: Do not imply the red-to-green sweep is a scored result. It is a coverage concept / intended Holo repair state only. The actual scored Holo Top 5 result failed.

recommended_labels.solo_matrix_title: Wave 1 Solo Stress Matrix: 20 Pairs / 120 Solo Calls
recommended_labels.transition_label: coverage concept / intended Holo repair state
recommended_labels.top5_label: Actual Top 5 Holo Rescue: FAILED INTERNAL EVIDENCE
recommended_labels.v7_label: V7 hardening committed; live validation blocked before provider calls

allowed_language: Wave 1 is internal stress-matrix seam discovery evidence.
The Top 5 Holo rescue result failed and is internal hardening evidence only.
V7 is hardened and preflight-ready, but no V7 live result exists because live execution was blocked before provider calls.
The strict public denominator remains blind-120 only.
forbidden_language: Wave 1 proves global FPR/FNR or natural production-rate prevalence.
The Wave 1 Top 5 Holo rescue is a Holo win.
The red-to-green transition is a scored Holo result.
V7 has a live validation result.
